summary: Current task graph for the conversation-first Tauri desktop agent, aligned with the live repo state and the claw-code hardening track.

phases.name: Current Architecture Baseline
phases.description: Tracks the product boundaries that already exist in source and must stay aligned with docs and verification artifacts.

tasks.title: Conversation-first desktop shell is the live product
tasks.description: The active product is the Tauri + Solid desktop app under apps/desktop with session-based conversations, inline tool events, Settings-based preflight, and warm-token light theme.

tasks.title: Rust IPC contracts are canonical
tasks.description: Rust source models and command signatures under apps/desktop/src-tauri define the contract; generated frontend bindings live in ipc.generated.ts and ipc.ts remains thin.
tasks.artifact: docs/IMPLEMENTATION.md (2026-04-12 Core / Client / IPC boundary refactor)

tasks.title: Agent loop, tools, and permissions run in Rust
tasks.description: The real desktop loop, tool executor, permission escalation, MCP routing, and session registry are implemented in the Rust backend rather than a frontend runtime.

phases.name: Repo Hardening Toward Claw-Code Operational Rigor
phases.description: Repository truth cleanup, headless doctor, deterministic parity/session harness, and CI alignment.

tasks.title: Clean up repository source of truth
tasks.description: Align workspace license metadata, remove dead workspace entries, make runtime::CompactionConfig::default() the canonical compaction source, set pnpm check as the canonical frontend gate, and update live docs to the current desktop product.
tasks.artifact: docs/IMPLEMENTATION.md (2026-04-14 Repo hardening toward claw-code operational rigor)

tasks.title: Add headless relay-agent-doctor
tasks.description: Ship a dedicated doctor binary, shared diagnostics service, root pnpm doctor script, stable JSON report types, and integration coverage for ready/login-required/auth-failure/missing-workspace/missing-runtime-asset cases.

tasks.title: Expand deterministic parity with a desktop full-session harness
tasks.description: Extract shared desktop smoke support, reuse it from compat-harness, and cover claw-style streaming text, plugin tool roundtrip, auto compaction, and token cost reporting deterministically.

tasks.title: Align CI with documented acceptance criteria
tasks.description: Replace Linux-only CI with Ubuntu and Windows coverage, run pnpm check plus launched-app smokes, add docs truth guards, and keep release packaging separate from the main acceptance workflow.
tasks.artifact: docs/IMPLEMENTATION.md (2026-04-14 Repo hardening toward claw-code operational rigor)
